Glossary: "naur" means north water.
Glossary: "felin" means small lantern.
Grammar: plural of tiro is tiros.
Grammar: plural of vela is velas.
Arithmetic note: 14 plus 8 equals 22.
Arithmetic note: 9 plus 6 equals 15.
Packing note: Rumi bought tea, rope, and chalk but not blue soap.
Music note: Asha practiced the D minor scale before noon.
